title: Bubba the Redneck Werewolf
overview: Bubba is madly in love with the beautiful Bobbie Jo. In a desperate attempt to impress her, he makes a pact with the devil to become the toughest guy in town. But when he wakes up the next morning, he finds himself transformed into a werewolf.
